vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-645: Tests: root Vitest config does not discover ActionsSection.test.tsx

plan.title: Tests: root Vitest config does not discover ActionsSection.test.tsx
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-6

narratives.Problem: Root vitest include patterns only match tests/**/*.test.ts and src/**/__tests__/**/*.test.ts, missing 13 colocated *.test.tsx frontend files. Even expanding patterns wouldn't work because root config lacks jsdom environment and React plugin.
narratives.Proposal: Create a vitest.workspace.ts that references all three project vitest configs (root, frontend, desktop), letting root vitest discover and run all tests with correct environments. Simplify npm test script to a single vitest invocation.

narrative.Action: Create vitest.workspace.ts referencing vitest.config.ts, src/dashboard/frontend/vitest.config.ts, and apps/desktop/vitest.config.ts. Each project keeps its own environment, plugins, and include patterns.

subItems.title: vitest.workspace.ts exists at project root and references all three vitest configs
npx vitest --run from root discovers ActionsSection.test.tsx and other colocated frontend tests

items.title: Simplify npm test script to single vitest invocation

narrative.Action: Update package.json test script from 'vitest --run --no-file-parallelism && cd src/dashboard/frontend && npm test' to 'vitest --run --no-file-parallelism' since the workspace config handles frontend test discovery.

subItems.title: npm test runs both backend and frontend tests in a single vitest invocation

narrative.Action: Run npx vitest --run against ActionsSection.test.tsx from root to confirm it executes. Run npm test to confirm all backend and frontend tests pass. Verify no regressions in existing test runs.

subItems.title: npx vitest --run src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/inspector/ActionsSection.test.tsx succeeds from project root
npm test passes with no regressions
